name: Chigusa Hitachi
description:
__Race:__ Human
__Height:__ 154 cm (5'1")
__Affiliation:__ Takemikazuchi Familia
__Level:__ 2

Chigusa Hitachi is a member of the Takemikazuchi Familia. Despite having a timid and shy personality, she is loyal to her Familia, especially Ouka who she has feelings for.
